basic_details.short_information: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) has released the NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026 notification for Therapist (Male & Female) and Multi-purpose Health Worker posts on a contract basis through Walk-in Interview under Advt No. NAM/DPMSU/TSR/EST-64/2026-27. Candidates must have passed SSLC (10th Standard) with one year experience in assisting Ayurveda Panchakarma Therapy in Government institutions or reputed private Ayurveda centres for Therapist posts, while Multi-purpose Health Worker candidates should possess GNM Nursing qualification with Kerala Nursing & Midwife Council registration, wi

age_limit.details: Therapist (Male): Maximum age limit is 40 years. Relaxation for Retired Ayurveda Therapists: Below 60 years. Relaxation for Experienced candidates: Upper age limit 50 years. Therapist (Female): Maximum age limit is 40 years. Therapist (Male & Female): Age limit not specified. Multi-purpose Health Worker: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC pass with one year experience in assisting Ayurveda Panchakarma Therapy.
qualification.details: Therapist (Male): Kerala Govt. approved Ayurveda Therapist course OR One year Ayurveda Therapy course from National Ayurveda Research Institute, Cheruthuruthy. Therapist (Female): Kerala Govt. approved Ayurveda Therapist course OR One year Ayurveda Therapy course from National Ayurveda Research Institute, Cheruthuruthy. Therapist (Male & Female): SSLC (10th Standard) examination AND A minimum of one year's experience in assisting Ayurveda Panchakarma Therapy in Government institutions or reputed private Ayurveda centres. Multi-purpose Health Worker: GNM Nursing approved by a recognized Nursing School with Kerala Nursing & Midwife council registration.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala).

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The available posts are Therapist (Male & Female) and Multi-purpose Health Worker.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview and verification will be held on 14th May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Therapist post?
faq.answer: For the Therapist (Male & Female) post, the minimum qualification is SSLC (10th Standard) examination with one year of experience in assisting Ayurveda Panchakarma Therapy.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Therapist (Male) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Therapist (Male) post is 40 years, with relaxations available for retired and experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Therapist post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Therapist post is Rs. 14700/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their application form, bio-data, original certificates, self-attested copies of certificates, and photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to take place?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to take place at the office of the District Programme Manager, National AYUSH Mission, Thrissur, Kerala, Pincode: 680022.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
